# DeepSeek API Usage Analytics Dashboard — Full Content

> A free, privacy-first analytics tool for DeepSeek API users. Drop your monthly ZIP exports or CSV files and get instant cost analytics, cache analysis, and per-key breakdowns. Open source (MIT), bilingual (EN/中文), entirely browser-side. No account, no upload, no database. Built by Gavin Chen & the MindRose team. Version 0.5.4.

---

## Features

**Bilingual UI** — Full English and 简体中文 support across all pages and content. Auto-detects browser language on first visit, with a one-click toggle to switch anytime. All documentation (User Guide, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, Changelog) is available in both languages.

**Share Card Generation** — Generate professional 1200×630 social media infographic cards from any dashboard tab (Overview, Projects, Keys, Cache, Trends). Each card includes a KPI hero number, theme-aware mini-chart, QR code linking back to the app, and custom "From" signature. Copy to clipboard (paste directly into WeChat/Feishu/DingTalk) or download as PNG.

**Open Source** — Fully open source under the MIT license. Codebase is public on GitHub with community infrastructure: CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, issue templates, and pull request template. Anyone can audit, fork, or contribute.

**Dashboard Tabs**:
- Overview — Total cost hero, daily cost bar chart, cost-by-key donut chart
- By Custom Projects — Drag-and-drop key assignment to custom project groups with per-project aggregation
- By Key — Per-key breakdown table with inline usage bars and cache hit rate color coding
- Cache — Hit rate hero, daily trend line, per-key hits-vs-misses stacked bars
- Trends — Multi-metric toggleable line chart (cost, tokens, cache hit rate, request count)
- Model filter across all views when data has 2+ models

**Privacy** — All CSV parsing and chart rendering happens entirely in the browser. No data is ever uploaded to any server. ZIP archives are extracted client-side. The app is a static website with no backend, no database.

**Tech Stack** — Next.js 16 (static export), React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, ECharts 6, Papa Parse, JSZip, html2canvas, qrcode. Hubot Sans font with Chinese fallback (PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei). Apple-minimalist design with full light/dark dual-theme support via CSS custom properties.

---

## How It Works

### English

**1. Export Data** — Go to DeepSeek Platform → Usage → Export monthly data. Each month downloads as a ZIP containing amount and cost CSVs.

**2. Drag & Drop** — Drag your ZIP files (or extracted CSVs) onto this page. Multiple months are automatically paired and merged.

**3. View Analytics** — Instantly see cost charts, per-key breakdowns, cache hit analysis, usage trends, and custom project groupings — all processed locally in your browser.

### 中文

**1. 导出数据** — 前往 DeepSeek 平台 → 用量 → 导出月度数据。每月下载一个 ZIP 包，内含 amount 和 cost 两个 CSV 文件。

**2. 拖拽上传** — 将 ZIP 文件（或解压后的 CSV）拖拽到此页面。多个月份文件会自动按文件名配对并合并。

**3. 查看分析** — 即刻查看费用图表、各 Key 用量明细、缓存命中分析、使用趋势和自定义项目分组 — 所有数据在浏览器本地处理。

---

## Frequently Asked Questions / 常见问题

### English

**Q1: Is my data uploaded to any server?**
No. All CSV parsing and cost computation runs entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.

**Q2: What files do I need to upload?**
You can drag the ZIP archive downloaded from the DeepSeek Platform directly — no extraction needed. Or you can extract and upload the amount-*.csv and cost-*.csv files manually.

**Q3: Can I analyze multiple months at once?**
Yes. Drag all your monthly ZIP (or CSV) files at once — they will be automatically paired by filename and concatenated.

**Q4: What models are supported?**
Any model listed in your DeepSeek exports. The dashboard auto-detects all models and provides a filter to view them individually or combined.

**Q5: Why does my cost show as $0?**
You need to upload both the amount CSV and the cost CSV for the same month. If either file is missing, cost data cannot be calculated.

**Q6: What does "Incomplete Upload" mean?**
It means a month has only the amount file or only the cost file — not both. Add the missing file and re-upload to resolve this.

**Q7: Where can I find more troubleshooting help?**
Check the Troubleshooting section in our full User Guide. It covers common issues like CSV format errors, cache configuration, file naming conventions, and more.

**Q8: Is there a file size limit?**
Yes, each file must be under 50 MB. This prevents malicious ZIP bombs from freezing your browser. DeepSeek monthly usage exports are typically under 1 MB, so this limit should never be an issue for normal use.

**Q9: Can I group API keys by custom projects?**
Yes. Switch to the 'By Custom Projects' tab and click the gear icon to open the configuration panel. Drag API key names from the unassigned pool into your custom project groups. Your project configuration is saved in your browser's local storage.

### 中文

**Q1: 我的数据会上传到服务器吗？**
不会。所有 CSV 解析和费用计算均在您的浏览器中完成，数据不会离开您的设备。

**Q2: 我需要上传哪些文件？**
直接拖拽从 DeepSeek 平台下载的 ZIP 压缩包即可，无需解压。也可以解压后手动上传 amount-*.csv 和 cost-*.csv 文件。

**Q3: 可以同时分析多个月份吗？**
可以。一次性拖入所有月份的 ZIP（或 CSV）文件，它们会根据文件名自动配对并拼接。

**Q4: 支持哪些模型？**
DeepSeek 导出中的所有模型均支持。仪表盘会自动检测所有模型，并提供筛选器以便单独或合并查看。

**Q5: 为什么费用显示为 0？**
需要同时上传同一个月的 amount CSV 和 cost CSV 两个文件。如果缺少其中任何一个，费用数据将无法计算。

**Q6: 显示"上传不完整"是什么意思？**
表示某个月份只有 amount 文件或只有 cost 文件，缺少另一个。补充缺失的文件并重新上传即可解决。

**Q7: 哪里可以找到更多故障排查帮助？**
请查看完整操作指南中的"常见问题排查"章节，涵盖了 CSV 格式错误、缓存配置、文件命名规范等常见问题。

**Q8: 有文件大小限制吗？**
有，单个文件不能超过 50 MB。这是为了防止恶意 ZIP 炸弹导致浏览器卡死。DeepSeek 月度用量导出文件通常小于 1 MB，正常使用不会触发此限制。

**Q9: 可以按自定义项目分组 API Key 吗？**
可以。切换到「按自定义项目」标签页，点击齿轮图标打开配置面板。将 API Key 从「未分配 Key」区域拖拽到对应的自定义项目分组中即可。项目配置保存在浏览器本地存储中。

---

## About / 关于我们

### English

**Why We Built This**
As our DeepSeek API calls surged, we found the official CSV billing exports nearly impossible to read at a glance. To answer questions like "which project consumed the most tokens?" and "what is our real cache hit rate?", we built our own simple, intuitive, and absolutely secure visualization dashboard.

**Under the Hood: Privacy & Tech**
When handling billing data, privacy is non-negotiable. That's why we chose a pure frontend architecture. Built with Next.js 16 (App Router) and React 19, powered by Papa Parse and ECharts, all CSV parsing and chart rendering happens 100% locally in your browser. No backend server, no database — your data never leaves your device. With Apple-inspired minimalist design and CSS custom property-driven dual themes, we aim to deliver the most elegant data analytics experience.

**About MindRose**
This project is open-sourced by Gavin Chen and the MindRose team. MindRose is a tech team focused on delivering lightweight digital solutions for small and medium manufacturers, logistics companies, and cross-border traders. We don't sell vague "digital transformation" concepts — we use AI and full-stack agile development (Next.js, React, Mendix, etc.) to deliver applications that solve real business pain points within weeks. From SEO-optimized independent e-commerce sites, to agile internal system builds, to AI agent workflow integration — we understand tech, and more importantly, we understand your business.

**Let's Work Together**
Looking to build a custom data dashboard for your business? Need deep AI integration into your workflows? Want modern, elegant UI/UX? Need cross-department, multi-terminal business systems? Or interested in collaborating on this open-source project? We offer professional bottleneck diagnosis, transformation analysis, tailored business solutions, and AI-powered development and operations. Get in touch: hello@mindrose.xyz

### 中文

**为什么开发这个工具？**
随着 DeepSeek API 调用的激增，我们发现官方后台导出的 CSV 账单数据难以直观阅读。为了搞清楚"到底哪个项目消耗了最多的 Token"以及"缓存命中率如何"，我们决定自己动手，打造一个简单、直观且绝对安全的可视化仪表盘。

**极致的隐私与技术架构**
处理账单数据，隐私是不可妥协的底线。因此，我们采用了纯前端的架构设计。基于 Next.js 16 (App Router) 和 React 19，结合 Papa Parse 与 ECharts，所有的 CSV 数据解析和图表渲染 100% 在你的浏览器本地完成。没有数据库，你的数据绝不会离开你的设备半步。配合 Apple 风格的极简设计和 CSS 自定义属性驱动的双主题，我们希望为你提供最优雅的数据分析体验。

**关于 MindRose**
本项目由 Gavin Chen 及 MindRose 团队开发并开源呈现。MindRose 是专注于为中小制造企业、物流公司及跨国贸易商提供轻量级数字化解决方案的科技团队。我们不卖虚无的"数字化转型"概念，而是通过 AI 技术与全栈敏捷开发（Next.js、React、Mendix 等），在几周内为你交付解决实际业务痛点的应用。从外贸独立站的 SEO 优化重构，到企业内部核心系统的敏捷搭建，再到 AI Agent 的业务流接入，我们懂技术，更懂你的商业场景。

**商业合作**
想要为你的企业定制类似的数据看板？或者需要将 AI 深度集成到你的业务工作流中？或者需要现代优雅的用户交互界面？或者需要多终端的跨部门业务系统？或者是基于当前开源项目的进一步合作？我们提供专业的瓶颈诊断、变革点分析、结合业务的定制化方案、和基于 AI 的开发及运维服务。联系我们：hello@mindrose.xyz

---

## Privacy Policy / 隐私政策

*Effective Date: June 13, 2026 / 生效日期：2026 年 6 月 13 日*

### English

**Introduction**
Your privacy is critically important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how the DeepSeek API Usage Analytics Dashboard ("the App") handles your data.

**1. No Data Collection**
The App is a pure client-side application. All CSV file parsing, cost computation, and chart rendering happen entirely within your browser. We do not collect, store, transmit, or have access to any of the CSV data you upload.

**2. Local Processing**
Your DeepSeek CSV files (amount-*.csv, cost-*.csv) are read and processed exclusively by JavaScript running in your browser. No data is sent to any backend server, database, or third-party service. The App has no server-side component for data handling. Application preferences you configure, such as custom project groupings, are stored only in your browser's local storage and are never transmitted.

**3. Google Analytics**
We use Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to collect anonymized page-view statistics. This helps us understand how the App is being used so we can improve it. GA4 may use cookies and collect information such as page URLs visited, browser type, and approximate geographic region. No CSV content or usage data from your uploaded files is tracked. You can opt out of Google Analytics tracking by using a browser extension such as Google's opt-out addon, or by configuring your browser to block third-party cookies. Google Analytics is only active when the environment variable NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID is configured. In local development environments, no analytics scripts are loaded.

**4. Third-Party Services**
Aside from Google Analytics (when configured), the App does not integrate any other third-party services, SDKs, or tracking scripts. No advertising networks, data brokers, or analytics providers beyond GA4 are used.

**5. Security**
Since all data processing occurs locally, your CSV files are inherently secure — they never leave your device. The App is served over HTTPS to ensure the application code is transmitted securely.

**6. Changes to This Policy**
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

**7. Contact**
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please open an issue on our GitHub repository or reach out to the development team.

### 中文

**引言**
您的隐私对我们至关重要。本隐私政策说明了 DeepSeek API 用量分析仪表盘（以下简称"本应用"）如何处理您的数据。

**1. 不收集数据**
本应用是纯客户端应用。所有 CSV 文件解析、费用计算和图表渲染都在您的浏览器内完成。我们不会收集、存储、传输或访问您上传的任何 CSV 数据。

**2. 本地处理**
您的 DeepSeek CSV 文件（amount-*.csv、cost-*.csv）仅由浏览器中运行的 JavaScript 读取和处理。任何数据都不会发送到后台服务器、数据库或第三方服务。本应用没有用于数据处理的服务器端组件。您配置的应用程序偏好设置（如自定义项目分组）仅保存在浏览器的本地存储中，不会向外传输。

**3. Google Analytics（谷歌分析）**
我们使用 Google Analytics 4（GA4）收集匿名的页面访问统计数据，以了解应用的使用情况并持续改进。GA4 可能会使用 Cookie 并收集页面 URL、浏览器类型和大致地理位置等信息。您上传的 CSV 内容和使用数据不会被跟踪。您可以通过安装浏览器的 Google 选择退出插件，或将浏览器配置为阻止第三方 Cookie，来选择退出 Google Analytics 跟踪。Google Analytics 仅在环境变量 NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID 已配置时激活。在本地开发环境中，不会加载任何分析脚本。

**4. 第三方服务**
除 Google Analytics（已配置时）外，本应用不集成任何其他第三方服务、SDK 或跟踪脚本。不使用广告网络、数据代理或 GA4 之外的任何分析服务。

**5. 安全性**
由于所有数据处理均在本地进行，您的 CSV 文件本质上是安全的——它们永远不会离开您的设备。本应用通过 HTTPS 提供服务，确保应用代码安全传输。

**6. 政策变更**
我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。变更将在本页面发布，并附上更新后的生效日期。我们建议您定期查看本政策。

**7. 联系我们**
如果您对本隐私政策有任何疑问或疑虑，请在我们的 GitHub 仓库提交 Issue，或联系开发团队。

---

## Terms of Use / 使用条款

*Effective Date: June 13, 2026 / 生效日期：2026 年 6 月 13 日*

### English

**Introduction**
By using the DeepSeek API Usage Analytics Dashboard ("the App"), you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use the App.

**1. As-Is Service**
The App is provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the App will be error-free, uninterrupted, or suitable for your specific needs.

**2. No Warranty**
To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. Use of the App is at your own risk.

**3. Not Affiliated with DeepSeek**
This App is an independent, open-source project developed by Gavin Chen and the MindRose team. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by DeepSeek (深度求索). All DeepSeek-related trademarks belong to their respective owners.

**4. User Data & Responsibility**
The App processes CSV data entirely in your browser. You are solely responsible for the data you upload and any decisions made based on the analytics results. We do not store, transmit, or have access to your data, and we bear no responsibility for any inaccuracies in the displayed analytics.

**5. Open Source**
The App is open source software released under the MIT License. You are free to review, modify, and distribute the source code in accordance with the license terms. The source code is available on GitHub. Full license text: MIT License — see the LICENSE file in the project repository.

**6. Limitation of Liability**
In no event shall the developers or contributors be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of or inability to use the App, even if advised of the possibility of such damages. This includes, but is not limited to, damages for errors, omissions, service interruptions, or financial losses.

**7. Changes to These Terms**
We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

**8. Contact**
If you have questions about these Terms of Use, please open an issue on our GitHub repository or reach out to the development team.

### 中文

**引言**
使用 DeepSeek API 用量分析仪表盘（以下简称"本应用"）即表示您同意本使用条款。如果您不同意，请勿使用本应用。

**1. 按现状提供**
本应用按"现状"和"可用"状态提供，不作任何明示或暗示的保证。我们不保证本应用无错误、不中断或适用于您的特定需求。

**2. 免责声明**
在法律允许的最大范围内，我们不承担所有保证，包括但不限于适销性、特定用途适用性和非侵权的默示保证。使用本应用的风险由您自行承担。

**3. 与 DeepSeek 无关**
本应用是由 Gavin Chen 和 MindRose 团队开发的独立开源项目。与 DeepSeek（深度求索）无任何关联、认可或赞助关系。所有 DeepSeek 相关商标归其各自所有者所有。

**4. 用户数据与责任**
本应用在您的浏览器中处理 CSV 数据。您对上传的数据以及基于分析结果做出的任何决策负全部责任。我们不存储、传输或访问您的数据，对于分析结果的任何不准确性不承担任何责任。

**5. 开源许可**
本应用是基于 MIT License 发布的开源软件。您可以自由查看、修改和分发源代码，但需遵守许可协议条款。源代码可在 GitHub 上获取。完整许可文本：MIT License — 请查看项目仓库中的 LICENSE 文件。

**6. 责任限制**
在任何情况下，开发者或贡献者均不对因使用或无法使用本应用而产生的任何直接、间接、附带、特殊、后果性或惩罚性损害承担责任，即使已被告知此类损害的可能性。这包括但不限于因错误、遗漏、服务中断或财务损失造成的损害。

**7. 条款变更**
我们保留随时修改本使用条款的权利。变更将在本页面发布，并附上更新后的生效日期。变更后继续使用本应用即表示您接受修订后的条款。

**8. 联系我们**
如果您对本使用条款有任何疑问，请在我们的 GitHub 仓库提交 Issue，或联系开发团队。

---

## Changelog / 更新日志

### English

**v0.5.4** (2026-06-24)

*Improved*
- updated token counts number format in Chinese Language.

**v0.5.3** (2026-06-21)

*Added*
- SEO enhancements — added keywords, twitter:site/creator, and author meta tags to all pages. Added Organization JSON-LD structured data for Google Knowledge Panel brand recognition. Expanded BreadcrumbList JSON-LD with all sub-page entries. Differentiated sitemap lastModified dates per route. Landing page OG image support for richer social media link previews.
- GA4 conversion events — added upload_csv, share_card, tab_switch, and language_switch event tracking via a shared trackEvent() analytics helper. Only active when NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID is configured.
- Community infrastructure — added CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, GitHub issue templates (bug report + feature request), and a pull request template to lower the contribution barrier.

*Improved*
- Responsive hero numbers — hero text now scales down on mobile screens, preventing horizontal overflow on small viewports.
- Chart accessibility — all ECharts instances now have descriptive aria-labels for screen readers.

*Fixed*
- Critical: DropZone error handling — added missing catch clause for ZIP/CSV processing errors. Previously, a corrupt file or extraction failure would leave the UI stuck in an infinite "Processing" spinner. Now shows a user-visible error message with the ability to retry.
- DataContext parser crash protection — wrapped parseDeepSeekData() in a try/catch inside the setTimeout callback. Previously, a synchronous parser crash would throw into the void with no user feedback. Now routes to the ErrorDisplay component.
- Empty states — OverviewView, KeyView, TrendsView, and ProjectView now show descriptive empty-state messages when data is zero/empty after model filtering.

**v0.5.2** (2026-06-17)
- Added: Social media share card generation for all 5 dashboard tabs (1200×630 infographic, customizable "From" signature, optional quote, per-tab mini-charts, QR code, logo watermark, clipboard copy, PNG download)
- Dependencies: Added html2canvas and qrcode packages

**v0.5.1**
- Added: Changelog page (/changelog) with Apple-minimalist bilingual design, JSON-LD WebPage schema, independent SEO metadata, version entries by category with color-coded dots
- Added: TitleBar clock icon and LandingPage "View Changelog" link
- Improved: TitleBar tooltips i18n support, sitemap with /changelog entry, translation system extended

**v0.5.0**
- Added: ZIP file upload support, custom project grouping with drag-and-drop, project configuration modal, CopyButton component, one-click cost copy, 50MB upload size limit
- Improved: Upload validation, keyboard accessibility, UI polish, i18n coverage, CopyButton memory leak fix, user guide and FAQ updates
- Dependencies: Added jszip

**v0.4.0**
- Added: Privacy Policy page (/privacy) and Terms of Use page (/terms) — bilingual legal content with independent SEO metadata and JSON-LD schemas. MIT LICENSE file. FooterBar links.
- Improved: sitemap expanded, translation system extended

**v0.3.3**
- Fixed: Cache hit rate chart accumulation bug in TrendsView
- Added: Cache hit rate percentage display on CacheView stacked bars, vercel.json with security headers and cache rules

**v0.3.2**
- Added: User Guide page (/guideline) with bilingual content and annotated screenshots, navigation links, 3 new FAQ entries (Q5–Q7)
- Improved: sitemap with /guideline entry, JSON-LD FAQPage expanded, .gitignore update

**v0.3.1**
- Added: JSON-LD BreadcrumbList schema (bilingual)
- Improved: Extended Chinese meta.description, alternateLocale in OpenGraph, landing page section anchor ids (#how-it-works, #faq, #about), version field in SoftwareApplication schema, content-visibility: auto for below-the-fold sections

**v0.3.0**
- Added: Expanded About section with 4 themed subsections, email copy button, social link pills (GitHub/LinkedIn/MindRose)
- Improved: Landing page section dividers, 14 new translation keys, site title rebrand, heading hierarchy fix

**v0.2.3**
- Added: Full-site SEO (generateMetadata, JSON-LD, robots.txt, sitemap.xml), noscript crawler fallback, theme-aware landing images, semantic hidden H1
- Improved: layout.tsx metadata, FooterBar and TitleBar extraction, warning translation group

**v0.2.2**
- Added: Logo icon and favicon, Hubot Sans WOFF2 fonts
- Improved: LanguageSwitcher (Apple pill), ThemeSwitcher (SVG icon), GitHub link in TitleBar, version in FooterBar, widened content container, scroll-reveal animations, accordion animation, global accessibility styles

**v0.2.1**
- Added: Landing page with Hero, upload area, How It Works, FAQ, and About sections

**v0.2.0**
- Added: Full light/dark theme switching with CSS custom properties, model filter (Apple-style segmented capsule)
- Improved: UI interactions and visual styling, view components refactored with hero big-number summaries

**v0.1.0**
- Added: Initial release — CSV parsing, multi-month concatenation, drag-and-drop upload, data context layer, multi-dimensional dashboard, i18n support with language switching, locale-aware number formatting

---

### 中文

**v0.5.4**（2026-06-24）

*改进*
- 改进token消耗量数字格式，更符合中文语法习惯。

**v0.5.3** (2026-06-21)

*新增*
- SEO 增强 — 为所有页面添加 keywords、twitter:site/creator 和 author 元标签。新增 Organization JSON-LD 结构化数据用于 Google Knowledge Panel 品牌识别。扩展 BreadcrumbList JSON-LD，包含所有子页面条目。各路由站点地图 lastModified 日期差异化。支持落地页 OG 图片。
- GA4 转化事件 — 通过共享的 trackEvent() 分析辅助函数新增 upload_csv、share_card、tab_switch 和 language_switch 事件追踪。仅在配置 NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID 时生效。
- 社区基础设施 — 新增 CONTRIBUTING.md、CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md、GitHub Issue 模板和 Pull Request 模板，降低贡献门槛。

*改进*
- 响应式 Hero 数字 — Hero 文本现在在移动端屏幕上自适应缩小，避免小视口上的水平溢出。
- 图表无障碍 — 所有 ECharts 实例现在具有供屏幕阅读器使用的描述性 aria-label。

*修复*
- 关键修复：DropZone 错误处理 — 为 ZIP/CSV 处理错误添加缺失的 catch 子句。此前，损坏的文件或解压失败会导致 UI 卡在无限「处理中」旋转状态。现在显示用户可见的错误信息，并允许重试。
- DataContext 解析器崩溃保护 — 在 setTimeout 回调中将 parseDeepSeekData() 包裹在 try/catch 中。此前，同步解析器崩溃会静默失败，无任何用户反馈。现在将错误路由至 ErrorDisplay 组件显示。
- 空状态 — OverviewView、KeyView、TrendsView 和 ProjectView 现在在模型筛选后数据为空时显示描述性的空状态提示信息。

**v0.5.2** (2026-06-17)
- 新增：社交媒体分享卡片（1200×630 信息图，支持自定义署名、可选文案、各标签页迷你图表、二维码、Logo 水印、一键复制至微信/飞书/钉钉、PNG 下载）
- 依赖变更：新增 html2canvas 和 qrcode 包

**v0.5.1**
- 新增：更新日志页面（/changelog），Apple 极简双语设计，JSON-LD WebPage Schema，独立 SEO 元数据，按类别彩色圆点分组
- 新增：TitleBar 时钟图标、落地页"查看更新日志"链接
- 改进：TitleBar 悬浮提示国际化、sitemap 扩展、翻译系统扩展

**v0.5.0**
- 新增：ZIP 文件上传支持、自定义项目分组（拖拽式）、项目配置弹窗、CopyButton 组件、费用一键复制、50MB 上传限制
- 改进：上传校验、键盘无障碍、UI 细节、国际化覆盖、CopyButton 内存泄漏修复、用户手册和 FAQ 更新
- 依赖变更：新增 jszip

**v0.4.0**
- 新增：隐私政策页面（/privacy）和使用条款页面（/terms）— 双语法务内容，独立 SEO 元数据和 JSON-LD Schema。MIT LICENSE 文件。FooterBar 链接。
- 改进：sitemap 扩展、翻译系统扩展

**v0.3.3**
- 修复：TrendsView 缓存命中率图表数据累加错误
- 新增：CacheView 堆叠柱状图命中率百分比显示、vercel.json 安全头与缓存规则

**v0.3.2**
- 新增：用户操作手册页面（/guideline）— 双语内容配标注截图、导航入口、3 个新 FAQ（Q5–Q7）
- 改进：sitemap 扩展、JSON-LD FAQPage 扩充、.gitignore 更新

**v0.3.1**
- 新增：JSON-LD BreadcrumbList 面包屑 Schema（双语）
- 改进：中文 meta.description 扩展、OpenGraph alternateLocale、落地页板块锚点 id、SoftwareApplication Schema version 字段、折叠区域 content-visibility: auto

**v0.3.0**
- 新增：关于板块扩展为 4 个主题子板块、邮箱复制按钮、社交链接胶囊（GitHub/LinkedIn/MindRose）
- 改进：落地页分割线、14 个新翻译键、站点标题更新、标题层级修复

**v0.2.3**
- 新增：全站 SEO（generateMetadata、JSON-LD、robots.txt、sitemap.xml）、noscript 爬虫回退、落地页主题感知图片、语义化隐藏 H1
- 改进：layout.tsx 元数据、FooterBar 和 TitleBar 组件提取、warning 翻译分组

**v0.2.2**
- 新增：Logo 图标和 favicon、Hubot Sans WOFF2 字体
- 改进：语言切换器（Apple 胶囊）、主题切换器（SVG 图标）、TitleBar GitHub 链接、FooterBar 版本号、内容容器扩宽、滚动渐显动画、手风琴动画、全局无障碍样式

**v0.2.1**
- 新增：落地页（Hero 区、上传区、使用说明、常见问题、关于）

**v0.2.0**
- 新增：完整明暗主题切换（CSS 变量）、模型筛选器（Apple 风格胶囊）
- 改进：UI 交互与视觉样式、视图组件重构（Hero 大数字汇总）

**v0.1.0**
- 新增：初始版本 — CSV 解析、多月份合并、拖拽上传、数据上下文层、多维度仪表盘、多语言支持与语言切换、不同语言环境的单位展示规则

---

- [DeepSeek API Pricing Calculator](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/deepseek-api-pricing-calculator) — Interactive pricing calculator with competitor comparison
- [Blog](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/blog) — DeepSeek API cost optimization articles and developer guides
- [Blog: Context Caching Guide](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/blog/deepseek-context-caching-guide) — Deep dive into DeepSeek prefix-matching disk caching
- [Blog: Cost Optimization Tools](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/blog/deepseek-cost-optimization-tools) — Top 5 DeepSeek API cost optimization & observability tools
- [Blog: OpenAI vs DeepSeek](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/blog/openai-vs-deepseek-cost-comparison) — OpenAI o3 vs DeepSeek V4 Pro cost-benefit analysis
